description: Baseline: unmodified s3dashmap. 25.4M ops/sec, 84.9% hit rate, CV 17.4% (noisy)

asi.note: CV=17.4% is noisy — need large improvements to be confident. ~25-28M ops/sec range across runs. 12 cores = 48 shards (default), shard_cap=625 per shard for 30K items.

description: Replace bump_freq CAS loop with simple load+store. +7.8% throughput, CV 3%

asi.hypothesis: CAS loop in bump_freq (80% of ops) replaced with relaxed load+store. Races harmless since freq is a heuristic saturating at 3.
asi.insight: fetch_update CAS loop was contended on hot entries under concurrent reads
